name: the-human-stack
description: The Human Stack plugins for JTBD analysis, sales, and nonprofit technology consulting workflows

plugins.name: jobs-2b-done
plugins.description: Jobs 2B Done -- Run JTBD analysis on sales, coaching, and industry call transcripts with UXinator Expectation Mapping. Pulls transcripts from Notion or pasted text, enriches with HubSpot and Clay connections, tracks coaching series with session numbering, saves structured analysis to organized folders, and populates the JTBD Analyses Notion database.

plugins.name: architect
plugins.description: Three-layer AI context framework. Bootstraps docs/architect/ with Product, Project, and Task layers. Auto-commits on plan approval and nudges feature-dev for implementation.

plugins.name: customer-support
plugins.description: Triage tickets, draft responses, escalate issues, and build your knowledge base. Research customer context and turn resolved issues into self-service content.

plugins.name: data
plugins.description: Write SQL, explore datasets, and generate insights faster. Build visualizations and dashboards, and turn raw data into clear stories for stakeholders.

plugins.name: enterprise-search
plugins.description: Search across all of your company's tools in one place. Find anything across email, chat, documents, and wikis without switching between apps.

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Streamline finance and accounting workflows, from journal entries and reconciliation to financial statements and variance analysis.

plugins.name: legal
plugins.description: Speed up contract review, NDA triage, and compliance workflows for in-house legal teams. Draft legal briefs, organize precedent research, and manage institutional knowledge.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Create content, plan campaigns, and analyze performance across marketing channels. Maintain brand voice consistency, track competitors, and report on what's working.

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: Write feature specs, plan roadmaps, and synthesize user research faster. Keep stakeholders updated and stay ahead of the competitive landscape.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Manage tasks, plan your day, and build up memory of important context about your work. Syncs with your calendar, email, and chat to keep everything organized.

plugins.name: sales
plugins.description: Prospect, craft outreach, and build deal strategy faster. Prep for calls, manage your pipeline, and write personalized messaging that moves deals forward.

plugins.name: instructional-designer
plugins.description: Design, audit, and rehearse training sessions. Timing checks, engagement checks, survey generation, slide review, dry-run coaching, and story harvesting.

plugins.name: cowork-plugin-management
plugins.description: Create, customize, and manage plugins tailored to your organization's tools and workflows. Configure MCP servers and adapt templates.

plugins.name: project-evident
plugins.description: 4-stage autonomous pipeline for Project Evident coaching: analyze call transcripts, populate 50 Essentials fields, push to Notion, and generate funder-ready Simon Summaries. Fire-and-forget with pipeline continuation chaining. Comment-based veto model.

plugins.name: brand-voice
plugins.description: Discover brand materials across enterprise platforms, generate LLM-ready guidelines, and enforce brand voice on AI content.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Accelerate design workflows — critique, design system management, UX writing, accessibility audits, research synthesis, and dev handoff.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Streamline engineering workflows — standups, code review, architecture decisions, incident response, and technical documentation.

plugins.name: human-resources
plugins.description: Streamline people operations — recruiting, onboarding, performance reviews, compensation analysis, and policy guidance.

plugins.name: operations
plugins.description: Optimize business operations — vendor management, process documentation, change management, capacity planning, and compliance tracking.

plugins.name: slack-by-salesforce
plugins.description: Official Slack MCP server for interactive and collaborative workflows. Surface insights, draft messages, and engage teams directly within Slack.

plugins.name: uxinator
plugins.description: Expectation Architecture for all delivery modes. Routes context to strategy, keynote, or training mode. Maps expectations, detects mode drift, designs deliverables, and evaluates sessions.

plugins.name: hoardinator
plugins.description: Ingest Claude Code JSONL session transcripts into Supabase for analytics and learning loop closure. Log, batch-ingest, and query session data across all your repos.
